name: Salmon Loaf Supreme with Cucumber Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Tbsp Finely chopped sweet red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Blend all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Place the mixture in a buttered 1 1/2 quart loaf pan and sprinkle with additional cracker crumbs.
4. Bake for 50 minutes, then serve with cucumber sauce.
